name: Oyster Fried Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix ingredients for each of the three mixes. Heat oil to 350°F in a wok.
2. Dredge mushrooms in flour mix and shake off excess. Dip mushrooms into water mix and shake off excess.
3. Dredge mushrooms in crumb mix. Fry mushrooms four to five at a time for about 1 1/2 minutes, being careful that the breading doesn't get beyond golden.
4. Drain mushrooms on a towel-covered plate. Allow a minute between batches for oil to reheat.
5. Mushrooms may be kept warm in an oven set to 250°F.
Serve garnished with fresh lime chunks.
